# Shagun Tyagi

> AI/ML Engineer and Full Stack Developer portfolio. Specialized in Python, IoT, and Cloud architectures, building data-driven systems and generative AI tools.

## Website
- [Shagun Tyagi Portfolio](https://shaguntyagi.tech): Main website, showcasing full experience, projects, blog posts, and visitor guestbook.

## Key Projects
- [FaceGuard Attendance](https://shaguntyagi.tech/project/faceguard): AI-powered face recognition classroom attendance tracking application built with Python and OpenCV.
- [Jarvis Assistant](https://shaguntyagi.tech/project/jarvis): Voice-controlled intelligent virtual assistant integrated with API integrations and custom automation scripts.

## Navigation
- [About Me](https://shaguntyagi.tech/about): Professional background, technical competencies, and certification details.
- [Projects Gallery](https://shaguntyagi.tech/projects): List of AI, machine learning, web dev, and IoT projects.
- [Experience Timeline](https://shaguntyagi.tech/experience): Professional career history and research roles.
